programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: The Fugitive S01E30
programme.desc: The Fugitive S01E30

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: With the use of an underwater camera fitted with a periscope lens Mike helps agents round up members of an organized crime syndicate

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike takes command of the first underwater flotilla of the United States Coast Guard Auxillary in search of sunken radioactive cargo

programme.title: 12 Oclock High
programme.desc: General Savage believes that Gallagher part of a military family is too quick to abort missions at the first sign of engine trouble Savage rides Gallagher hard assigning him a crew of slackers and misfits and ordering Gallagher to paint the name Leper Colony on his plane Gallagher turns his crew into an efficient outfit but he despises Savage and wants to do anything to get a transfer

programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Knight 303
programme.desc: Knight 303

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa Luke Kate Hassie and Little Luke McCoy travel from Smokey Corners West Virginia to California They take over an inherited farm and everyone loves it but Grandpa who has trouble adjusting to the new place

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Smart 526
programme.desc: Smart 526

programme.title: Smart 409
programme.desc: Smart 409

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agents help in blackmailing Gen Burkhalter so Klink wont be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton refuses permission for McHale and The Crew to put on a big show to raise funds for the local Orphanage Parker uses his newly-acquired skill as a Hypnotist to make The Captain more agreeable But the scheme is complicated by the visit of a Senator from the Armed Services Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker - A dead-ringer for an important British General - Agrees to put his life on the line by posing as The General to divert the attention of spies in New Caledonia while the real General carries out a crucial invasion of a Japanese-held island

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police captain William Boone is asked to join the security team of Companion Daan of the Taelon an alien race that came to earth three years ago

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Rowan who claims that she and Will were married in a previous life before she was burned as a witch finds herself accused of murder Can she find her true self before the angry mob takes the law into their own hands

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streers of San Francisco
programme.desc: The murder of a pregnant girl leads Stone and Keller to arrogant radio host Terry Vine who has a large female fanbase The dead girl claimed to be pregnant with Vines baby giving him a motive for murder and after her blackmailing roommate also turns up dead Keller is convinced Vine is the killer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: After a Mas Wrestling event, an athlete can have a wide range of upper body injuries. Andrew Bolinger specializes in power lifting, and with that comes a variety of bruises and muscle fatigue in the neck, lower arm, hip, and ankle areas.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Thompson v. Davion Peterson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Keith Katona v. Ron Carriere.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the best submissions from FALL 2014. Ryan Machan vs. Marcus Hicks; Chris Smeltzer vs. Tyson Oler; Mac Laursen vs. Troy Dunne.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order
